seo.title: All Live - Real-time JKT48 Live Stream Tracker
seo.description: Track all JKT48 and JKT48V live streams in real-time across IDN Live, Showroom, and YouTube. Get member names, viewer counts, stream duration, and live status — all in one endpoint.

hero.heading: Who's live right now?
hero.subheading: Track every JKT48 and JKT48V live stream in real-time — IDN Live, Showroom, and YouTube — all from a single API endpoint. Know who's on, how many viewers they have, and how long they've been streaming.

definition.title: What is the All Live endpoint?
definition.text:
The All Live endpoint returns a real-time snapshot of every active JKT48 and JKT48V live stream happening right now across all supported platforms.

Instead of querying IDN Live, Showroom, and YouTube separately — each with their own auth, rate limits, and response formats — JKT48Connect aggregates all of it into a single, normalized response.

Every active stream in the response includes:

- **Member info** — name, generation, and profile data linked to the stream
- **Platform** — `idn`, `showroom`, or `youtube` (JKT48V)
- **Viewer count** — current live viewer count, updated in real-time
- **Stream duration** — how long the stream has been live
- **Stream URL** — direct link to the live stream
- **Thumbnail** — live thumbnail image URL where available

The endpoint covers all active JKT48 members streaming on IDN Live or Showroom, and JKT48V content on YouTube — including unit streams and special broadcasts.

Data is refreshed continuously so viewer counts and stream status reflect what's actually happening right now, not cached from minutes ago.

capabilities_section.title: What you can do with All Live
capabilities_section.intro: Build live dashboards, notification systems, and fan apps with real-time JKT48 stream data.

capabilities.title: Aggregate all platforms in one call
capabilities.description: Get IDN Live, Showroom, and YouTube (JKT48V) streams in a single API response. No need to manage separate integrations or normalize different response formats yourself.

capabilities.title: Real-time viewer counts
capabilities.description: Viewer counts are pulled in real-time, so your app always shows accurate numbers — not cached data from minutes ago. Perfect for live dashboards and leaderboards.

capabilities.title: Member-linked stream data
capabilities.description: Every stream is linked to the corresponding JKT48Connect member record, giving you instant access to member name, generation, photo, and profile — no extra lookup needed.

capabilities.title: JKT48V YouTube support
capabilities.description: Covers JKT48V virtual content on YouTube alongside regular member streams on IDN Live and Showroom, so you never miss a broadcast regardless of platform.

capabilities.title: Filter by platform
capabilities.description: Query only IDN Live streams, only Showroom, or only YouTube — or get all platforms at once. Filter by generation or team to narrow results for your use case.

capabilities.title: Webhook notifications
capabilities.description: Set up webhooks to receive a POST request the moment any member goes live on any platform. Build oshi notification bots and fan alert systems without polling.

how_it_works.title: How All Live works
how_it_works.intro: One endpoint, all platforms, real-time data.

steps.title: Call the All Live endpoint
steps.description: Make a single GET request to /v1/live/all with your API key. No extra setup or platform-specific configuration needed.

steps.title: Receive normalized stream data
steps.description: Get a unified list of all active streams with consistent fields — platform, member, viewers, duration, URL — regardless of which platform each stream is on.

steps.title: Filter by platform or member (optional)
steps.description: Pass query parameters to filter by platform (idn, showroom, youtube), generation, or specific member ID. Get exactly the streams relevant to your app.

steps.title: Display or trigger actions
steps.description: Render a live dashboard, send push notifications, update a Discord bot, or trigger any action in your app based on who's live and their viewer counts.

use_cases.title: Who uses All Live
use_cases.intro: Fan developers building real-time JKT48 experiences.

items.title: Live dashboards and fansites
items.description: Display a real-time grid of all active JKT48 streams on your fansite. Show member photos, platform badges, and live viewer counts — updated automatically without page refresh.

items.title: Oshi notification bots
items.description: Build Discord or Telegram bots that ping fans the moment their oshi goes live on any platform. Use webhooks for instant notifications without polling the API every minute.

items.title: Viewer count leaderboards
items.description: Rank members by live viewer count in real-time. Build popular live trackers and oshi support apps that update as streams grow or end.

items.title: Multi-platform stream aggregators
items.description: Build apps that unify IDN Live, Showroom, and YouTube JKT48V streams into a single feed — so fans never have to check three separate platforms to know who's on.

related_features.title: Member Profiles
related_features.description: Each live stream is linked to a full member record. Access profiles, generations, and social links alongside stream data.

related_features.title: Event Notifications
related_features.description: Get notified for handshake events, off-air shows, and special appearances — not just live streams.

related_features.title: Theater Schedule
related_features.description: Track theater shows alongside live streams. Know which team is performing and when the next show goes live.

related_features.title: News & Announcements
related_features.description: Stay updated on JKT48 announcements that may accompany or follow live stream events.

faqs.title: Frequently asked questions
faqs.intro: Common questions about the All Live endpoint.

items.question: Which platforms are covered?
items.answer: The All Live endpoint covers IDN Live, Showroom, and YouTube (JKT48V). All three platforms are aggregated into a single normalized response with a platform field indicating the source of each stream.

items.question: How real-time is the viewer count data?
items.answer: Viewer counts are updated continuously. On Pro and Enterprise plans, data latency is under 10 seconds. On the free tier, data is refreshed every 30 seconds. Stream start and end events are detected within seconds across all plans.

items.question: Does it cover JKT48V (virtual) content?
items.answer: Yes. JKT48V YouTube streams are included alongside regular member streams on IDN Live and Showroom. JKT48V content is tagged with platform: 'youtube' and includes the stream title, thumbnail, and viewer count where available.

items.question: Can I filter streams by generation or team?
items.answer: Yes. Pass generation or team query parameters to filter the response. You can also filter by platform to get only IDN Live, only Showroom, or only YouTube streams.

items.question: How do I get notified when a member goes live?
items.answer: Use webhooks (available on Pro and Enterprise plans). Register a webhook URL and specify which members or platforms to watch. JKT48Connect will send a POST request to your endpoint within seconds of a stream starting.

items.question: What happens when a stream ends?
items.answer: Ended streams are removed from the All Live response immediately. If you're using webhooks, you'll also receive a stream_end event so your app can update in real-time without polling.
